name: recovery-score
_note: State-backed daily recovery score over globalThis._concordSTATE.wellnessLens (in-memory; NOT no_db — this lens is memory-backed by design, like saved.js). With no metrics logged for the actor's day it returns a neutral score 50 'yellow' with hasEnoughData:false — ok:true, never an error. The assassin runs with an internal owner actor so {} returns ok:true.
